description_long: This object consists of two slices of toasted bread, each topped with a generous layer of sliced avocado. The bread appears to be a medium-brown, slightly crisp toast, with visible texture and some uneven edges. The avocado slices are arranged in overlapping layers, displaying a fresh green color with some darker specks, likely seasoning such as black pepper. The surface of the avocado is slightly glossy, indicating ripeness and moisture. The slices are stacked in a slightly offset manner, giving a casual, homemade appearance. There is no visible packaging or serving plate, and the object is isolated against a plain background.
description: Two slices of toasted bread topped with fresh, sliced avocado and seasoning, arranged in a casual stack.
description_view_0: Front view showing both slices of toast with avocado, with one slice partially overlapping the other.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the thickness of the toast and the layered avocado slices on top.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the arrangement of avocado slices and the seasoning on both pieces.
description_view_3: Side view showing the height of the stacked toast and the texture of the bread crust.
